#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
echo "==> Fetching session refs"
git fetch "$JAMSESH_FETCH_REMOTE"
echo "==> Creating target branch ship/comments at fedcba987654"
git checkout -b 'ship/comments' 'fedcba9876543210fedcba9876543210fedcba98'
echo "==> Staging 3 curated commits"
git cherry-pick --no-commit 1111111111111111111111111111111111111111 2222222222222222222222222222222222222222 3333333333333333333333333333333333333333
echo "==> Composing squash commit"
git commit --author="$JAMSESH_RUNNER_NAME <$JAMSESH_RUNNER_EMAIL>" -F - <<'JAMSESH_MSG'
Ship the comments feature

- feat: comments REST endpoint
- feat: comments WebSocket gateway
- docs: document comments protocol

Co-authored-by: Alice Smith <alice@example.com>
Co-authored-by: Bob Tan <bob@example.com>
JAMSESH_MSG
echo "==> Done. Push when ready: git push origin 'ship/comments'"
